title: citrus arethusa
intro: Citrus arethusa, also known as the California bay or California bay laurel, is a species of evergreen shrub or small tree native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Citrus arethusa include its ability to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Citrus arethusa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
